SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.key_project.util

Packages that use org.key_project.util
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.abstraction
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.ccatch
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression.literal
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression.operator
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression.operator.adt
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor
contains classes representing visitors traversing the tree structure of Java programs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt
This package contains the "language data types" (LDTs) of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort
This package contains different kinds and implementations subtyping interface Sort.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct
contains classes representing the meta constructs of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
org.key_project.util
 
  • Classes in org.key_project.util used by de.uka.ilkd.key.java
    Class
    Description
    ExtList
    Extends java.util.LinkedList in order to collect elements according to their type.
    LRUCache
    Simple realisation of an LRU cache.
